subject: docs(accuracy): fix 7 documentation discrepancies found during doc audit
body:
1. TODO.md: Remove 3 completed items still listed as pending:
   - "Validate loaded design state" (bounds-check + PAGE_FIELDS filter done)
   - "Multi-page export uses arbitrary timeout" (replaced with waitForPaint)
   - "Sanitize markdown HTML output" (DOMPurify already in AdCanvas)

2. CLAUDE.md AI Notes: Correct pxToPt value from 0.5 to 1 — code uses
   pxToPt=1 for digital PDFs (1:1 pixel-to-point mapping), not 0.5.

3. CLAUDE.md Architecture: Add ColorPicker.jsx and ThemeColorPicker.jsx
   which existed but were missing from the documented file list.

4. TutorialModal.jsx: Fix 4 section name mismatches with actual UI:
   - "Upload" → "Images" (matches Media tab section)
   - "Adjust" → "Image Overlay & Filters" (matches actual sections)
   - "Borders" → "Frames" (matches Style tab section)
   - Added missing "Background" bullet to Style tab step

5. SESSION_NOTES.md: Rewrite with current session context (was 6 days stale)

6. HISTORY.md: Add 2026-03-27 entries for review/audit/doc sweep

Tags: docs, accuracy, tutorial, claude-md, todo
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-review-sweep
